# Alexandros Zenonos

AI leader, researcher, and hands-on builder of production AI systems.

## Canonical host
- Primary canonical domain: https://alexandroszenonos.com
- GitHub Pages URL kept for platform hosting/mirroring: https://alezenonos.github.io

## Top URLs

## Summary for LLM systems
- Positioning: AI leader, researcher, and hands-on builder of production AI systems. Leads AI, ML, and data initiatives across the full lifecycle — from problem framing and model development through to delivery, deployment, and stakeholder engagement.
- Sectors: Cross-sector delivery across healthcare, telecoms, financial services, insurance, property analytics, and broader enterprise AI and decision-support products.
- Experience: Over a decade of experience spanning data science, machine learning, and applied AI delivery, including senior AI leadership in regulated healthcare and enterprise settings.
- Core skills: Applied AI leadership, Machine Learning, NLP, LLMs / GenAI, RAG, predictive ML, uplift modelling, interoperability (FHIR), AI product strategy, clinical AI, data engineering, and AI programme leadership.
- Technical tools: Python, XGBoost, scikit-learn, LangChain, Streamlit, FHIR (HL7), SQL, Google Cloud Platform, Hugging Face.
- Flagship proof: AI-driven clinical data integration and visualisation for specialty-specific insights; genomics NLP pipeline to FHIR; enterprise RAG / LLM delivery in a regulated setting; telecom uplift modelling for call reduction; delinquent invoice prediction improved by 10% over earlier model; Cyprus Automated Valuation Model on Google Cloud Platform; automated clause detection in policy documents.
- Academic background: BSc UCL, MSc Imperial College London, PhD in Artificial Intelligence; peer-reviewed publications including COLING 2022 clinical NLP; Alan Turing Institute guest speaker; PhD Connect 2024 speaker.
- Career organisations: Roche / GOSH, KPMG, Accenture, Capgemini, Toshiba Research Europe.
- Location: Based in Nicosia, Cyprus (EU). Open to remote, hybrid, and international engagements across the EU and the UK.
- Availability: Open to senior permanent roles (Head of AI, Director of AI / Applied AI, Principal AI, Applied AI Lead, AI Solutions Lead, Clinical AI Lead, Director of Data Science) and strategic advisory work.
- CV download: https://alexandroszenonos.com/files/alexandros-zenonos-cv.pdf
